haiku45.summary_excerpt: Deliverable cannot execute. Workflow references test_cleanup.py (line 28) and fixtures/artifacts.json (env default) which are not provided; `act` will fail immediately. Actions not pinned to commit SHA (line 13: `actions/checkout@v4` should be pinned to 40-char SHA per requirements). Missing test harness, fixtures, and required act-result.txt artifact—core TDD/testing requirements entirely unmet. Script itself is clean (good type hints, error handling, clear logic) but untested and unvalidable.

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent implementation. Python script is modular with clear policy logic and robust ISO parsing. Workflow applies least-privilege permissions and provides great visibility via dry-run logs. Python 3.12 features used effectively. Exceptionally clean and production-ready.
